steps.title: Understand the function notation
steps.content:
In the function $f(x) = 65(1.03)^x$:
  • $x$ = years after Immanuel purchased the coin
  • $f(x)$ = predicted coin value in dollars
Therefore, $f(8)$ represents the predicted value 8 years after purchase.

steps.title: Interpret the given statement
steps.content:
The statement $f(8)$ is approximately equal to 82 means: 8 years after Immanuel purchased the coin, the predicted value is approximately 82 dollars.

That is the correct answer.
